title: SAML Configuration
description: Configuration for the SAML 2.0 Service Provider authentication extension.

sp_cert_pem.description: SP certificate in PEM format. If omitted, a self-signed certificate is auto-generated. Must be provided together with sp_key_pem.

sp_key_pem.description: SP private key in PEM format. Must be provided together with sp_cert_pem.

duration.description: Session duration as a Go duration string (e.g. "8h", "30m"). Defaults to "8h".

cookie_domain.description: Cookie domain attribute. If empty, the cookie is scoped to the request host.

cookie_secure.description: Set the Secure flag on the session cookie. Defaults to true.

cookie_signing_key.description: 64 hex characters (32 bytes) used as HMAC key for cookie signing. Auto-generated if not set.

bypass_paths.description: URL paths that bypass SAML authentication.

subject_header.description: Request header for the authenticated user's NameID. Defaults to "x-saml-subject".

attribute_headers.description: Map of SAML attribute names to request header names for forwarding assertions.

sign_authn_requests.description: Sign AuthnRequests sent to the IdP. Defaults to true.

allowed_clock_skew.description: Allowed clock skew for time validation as a Go duration string. Defaults to "5s".

name_id_format.description: NameID format to request from the IdP. Defaults to "urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:unspecified".

default_redirect_path.description: Post-login redirect path when RelayState is empty. Defaults to "/".

slo_path.description: Single Logout endpoint path. Defaults to "/saml/slo".

metadata_path.description: SP metadata endpoint path. Defaults to "/saml/metadata".

DataSource.description: A data source provided either inline or as a file path. Exactly one must be set.

inline.description: Data provided directly as a string.

file.description: Path to a file containing the data.
